layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout: one asset per COLUMN, category rows (EIF; SP,DC,JT; Stock Name; Ticker; Transaction; Value of Asset A-L; Type of Income; Amount of Income A-K) run down the left. Black-filled cells mark the selected bucket. The Transaction row is solid black across all five asset columns (no transaction codes legible). The EIF row is black-filled for the 'TRG Growth Partnership (Cayman Onshore) II LP' column only. Footer/group label bottom-left: 'MS MR Trust Partnership'. Single Amount of Income block on this page.
